nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: By the way, I had to go back the same way later.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: Fortunately, it was much easier with the map.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: I'm afraid, after such a story, no other one will seem even close to as scary.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: It's hard to argue with that.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: This story, I think, is even scarier than the muffin story.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: Speaking of muffins. Where's the Pay?

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: She went to sleep.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: I think I should go too.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Thank you for the stories, they were very interesting.

nodes.speaker: dusk
nodes.text: Good night.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: I…

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: I wanted to tell my story…

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: …But our developer didn't have enough time for it…

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: …So I'm going to sleep too.

nodes.speaker: strikely
nodes.text: Good night!

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Are you coming too? You said you wanted to sleep.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: I would like.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: But now that I remember what was there…

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: …I won't sleep a damn.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: I see.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: Don't you want to sleep yourself?

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Nuh, I think I'll stay a little longer.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: Are you scared?

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: Of couse not!...

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: …maybe.

nodes.speaker: serious_tale
nodes.text: Heh, well, stay if you want. It's always more interesting together.

nodes.speaker: bowler_hat
nodes.text: …yep.
